listing.title: 56 - 2651 AQUITAINE AVENUE Mississauga (Meadowvale), Ontario L5N1V5
listing.description: This spacious townhome offers 3 generously sized bedrooms, 1.5 bathrooms, and a versatile flex room that can be used as a home office, recreation room, guest area, or additional sleeping space. The flex room provides direct access to a fully fenced private backyard, creating the perfect space for children, pets and outdoor entertaining. The home also features a private garage and driveway parking for added convenience. Enjoy your morning coffee or unwind in the evening from your private balcony, easily accessed from the bright, sun-filled kitchen and breakfast nook.

brokerage.name: RE/MAX PREMIER INC.
brokerage.address: 1885 WILSON AVE STE 200A, TORONTO, Ontario M9M1A2
